profile.name: Bangya Liu
profile.title: Member of Technical Staff, Abaka.ai | Research Scientist, 2077AI Open Source Foundation | Ph.D. Candidate, ECE @ UW–Madison
bio: I work where 3D vision, video generation, and embodied AI feed into each other, getting models to see the geometry of a scene, imagine new versions of it, and act inside it through hands, robots, and vision-language-action policies.

I'm finishing up my Ph.D. at the [MadNets](https://madnets.cs.wisc.edu/) Lab (originally WiNGS) at UW–Madison, advised by [Prof. Suman Banerjee](https://pages.cs.wisc.edu/~suman/), where I bounce between video DiTs, Gaussian splats, and the network plumbing underneath.
Always happy to chat. Drop a note about anything.

experience.org: Huazhong University of Science and Technology

projects.title: OmniHaMeR: Foundation Model for Metric Hand Pose Estimation
projects.description: A vision foundation model that maps arbitrary RGB, depth, mask, or multi-view inputs to metric hand meshes in world coordinates. Targets absolute-pose accuracy for VLA co-training, with a MapAnything-style backbone and a MANO head.

projects.title: CyberArena: Adversarial Cybersecurity Arena for LLM Coding Agents
projects.description: A live-combat sandbox where attacker and defender LLM agents fight under partial observability, going past static CTF benchmarks. We propose the Defend/Attack Token Ratio (DATR), a token-level metric capturing offense/defense economic asymmetry across model tiers.

projects.title: ByteLOOM: Weaving Geometry-Consistent Human-Object Interactions Videos through Progressive Curriculum Learning
projects.description: A human-object interaction video generator built on Wan2.1, trained on a curated open-source HOI corpus. Adds geometry-aware conditioning that fuses multi-view object references with relative coordinate maps for viewpoint-consistent synthesis.

projects.title: SwinGS: Sliding Window Gaussian Splatting for Volumetric Video Streaming with Arbitrary Length
projects.description: Streaming-friendly training, delivery, and rendering of volumetric video. Combines spacetime Gaussians with MCMC and a sliding window of per-frame snapshots, removing the duration limits of prior dynamic 3DGS.

projects.title: Accelerating Transformer-Based Monocular SLAM via Geometric Utility Scoring
projects.description: LeanGate, a feed-forward frame-gating network for transformer-based monocular SLAM. Scores each frame's geometric utility before the heavy GFM stage and skips over 90% of redundant frames, cutting >85% of FLOPs and giving a 5× throughput speedup at dense-baseline accuracy.

projects.title: SpatialStack: Layered Geometry-Semantic Fusion for 3D Spatial Reasoning
projects.description: A hierarchical fusion framework that aligns multi-level geometric features with language backbones for 3D spatial reasoning in VLMs. Captures both fine local geometry and broader semantics, with strong results across multiple benchmarks.

projects.title: Egocentric World Model for Photo-Realistic Hand–Object Interaction Synthesis
projects.description: An egocentric world model that synthesizes photo-realistic hand-object interaction videos from a first-person view. Bridges generative world-model priors with embodied scene understanding to produce VLA-friendly training data.

projects.title: CETCam: Camera-Controllable Video Generation via Consistent and Extensible Tokenization
projects.description: A camera-controllable video generator built on a consistent, extensible token representation. Enables precise camera trajectory steering while keeping scene content stable across long, viewpoint-varying shots.

projects.title: MV-S2V: Multi-View Subject-Consistent Video Generation
projects.description: A multi-view-aware video generator that keeps subject identity coherent across viewpoints. Turns a few subject references into temporally stable, viewpoint-consistent video without per-subject finetuning.

projects.title: VEFX-Bench: A Holistic Benchmark for Generic Video Editing and Visual Effects
projects.description: A benchmark spanning generic video editing and VFX, covering object, style, and motion edits alongside complex visual effects. Provides paired references and human-aligned metrics for fair cross-model evaluation.

projects.title: Privacy-Aware Sharing of Raw Spatial Sensor Data for Cooperative Perception
projects.description: A V2V cooperative perception scheme that shares raw spatial sensor data without leaking sensitive identifiers. Uses foundation-model-driven scrubbing to preserve scene geometry while removing privacy-revealing content.

projects.title: Can Test-Time Scaling Improve World Foundation Model?
projects.description: Investigates whether test-time scaling, well-known for lifting LLM reasoning, also helps world foundation models. Proposes SWIFT, a training-free strategy that improves video generation fidelity by allocating extra compute at inference.

projects.title: Sustainable Spectrum Crowdsensing
projects.description: A federated learning framework for crowdsensed spectrum data with blockchain-backed incentives, sustaining long-term participation across distributed sensors while protecting raw measurements from leakage.

projects.title: MachSim: A Speedy and Scalable Flow Simulator for Traffic Distribution Prediction in Datacenter Networks
projects.description: A scalable datacenter-network flow simulator. Treats flows as a DAG with local merging and multiprocessing, hitting 500K flows across 100 switches in 15s. Used inside ByteDance to verify config updates before rollout.

projects.title: MEG: A RISC-V-Based System Emulation Infrastructure for Near-Data Processing
Rocket-Chip FPGA Transplant
projects.description: A Verilog wrapper for Rocket-Chip plus a Linux boot flow on the Digilent Nexys4DDR, an affordable RISC-V platform for booting Linux and evaluating workloads without a pure simulator. 137★ / 29 forks on GitHub.
